descriptions: 一段跨越两章的短途航行。

segments.source_text: 一段跨越两章的短途航行。
黎明时，星港的灯逐一熄灭。
短暂的跃迁之后，新世界出现在眼前。
船员把这一天写进共同的航海日志。
这是一条保留内部链接的脚注。

descriptions: 一段跨越两章的短途航行。

included: OPF title, description, and subject metadata (creator is display-only)
processing_rules.language: existing dc:language values are set to the export target; one is added if absent; XHTML and nav html roots receive matching lang and xml:lang
processing_rules.links: URLs, paths, anchors, element names, and non-image attributes are never translated
processing_rules.missing_translation: missing, failed, non-string, or blank translations keep source text
processing_rules.order: OPF metadata, spine order, remaining XHTML manifest order, then NCX
processing_rules.ruby: ruby base text is translated; rt and rp pronunciation/fallback text is kept
processing_rules.splitting: each XML slot is deterministically split at sentence/whitespace boundaries to at most 1800 source characters; joiner stores the exact separator after a part
processing_rules.whitespace: leading and trailing whitespace in every XML slot is preserved
